description: Go test harness with CLI runner and LCG replication
steps: buildSlopCLI compiles slop binary
runSlopProgram runs .slop via CLI in temp dir
buildSource replaces SIZE_PLACEHOLDER in templates
lcgNext/lcgBuildArray replicate sloplang's LCG in Go
formatSummary/formatIntArray produce expected output strings

description: fibonacci.slop — recursive fib(0..9), results to file
steps: Write fibonacci.slop with fib function and file output
Write TestPhase8_Fibonacci reading results.txt
Run test and verify PASS

description: wordcount.slop — word frequency counter with hashmap, results to file
steps: Write wordcount.slop with ##counts ?? w key check
Write TestPhase8_WordCount reading results.txt
Run test and verify PASS

description: array_ops_demo.slop — array manipulation at 7 sizes, results to file
steps: Write array_ops_demo.slop with LCG + insert/search/delete/update
Write TestPhase8_ArrayOps parameterized by 7 sizes
Go test replicates LCG and computes expected results.txt
Run all 7 size subtests and verify PASS

description: linear_search.slop — linear search at 7 sizes, results to file
steps: Write linear_search.slop with LCG + insert/search/delete/update
Write TestPhase8_LinearSearch parameterized by 7 sizes
Go test replicates LCG and computes expected results.txt
Run all 7 size subtests and verify PASS

description: binary_search.slop — binary search with embedded merge sort at 7 sizes
steps: Write binary_search.slop with merge_sort + binary_search
Write TestPhase8_BinarySearch parameterized by 7 sizes
Go test replicates LCG, sorts, and computes expected results.txt
Run all 7 size subtests and verify PASS

description: bubble_sort.slop — bubble sort at 7 sizes, results to file
steps: Write bubble_sort.slop with in-place swap via $ dynamic access
Write TestPhase8_BubbleSort parameterized by 7 sizes
Go test replicates LCG, sorts, and computes expected results.txt
Run all 7 size subtests and verify PASS

description: merge_sort.slop — merge sort at 7 sizes, results to file
steps: Write merge_sort.slop with recursive merge sort
Write TestPhase8_MergeSort parameterized by 7 sizes
Go test replicates LCG, sorts, and computes expected results.txt
Run all 7 size subtests and verify PASS

description: quick_sort.slop — quick sort at 7 sizes, results to file
steps: Write quick_sort.slop with functional partition approach
Write TestPhase8_QuickSort parameterized by 7 sizes
Go test replicates LCG, sorts, and computes expected results.txt
Run all 7 size subtests and verify PASS

description: heap_sort.slop — heap sort at 7 sizes, results to file
steps: Write heap_sort.slop with heapify using $ dynamic access
Write TestPhase8_HeapSort parameterized by 7 sizes
Go test replicates LCG, sorts, and computes expected results.txt
Run all 7 size subtests and verify PASS

description: bst.slop — binary search tree at 7 sizes, results to file
steps: Write bst.slop with parallel-array BST
Write TestPhase8_BST parameterized by sizes (may skip 100K)
Go test replicates LCG, builds BST, and computes expected results.txt
Run all size subtests and verify PASS

description: final verification — full test suite passes, docs updated
steps: Run go test ./... and verify all tests pass
Update docs/architecture.md with Phase 8 Done
Flip all passes to true in phase8-real-programs.json
